title: Potion as Weapon
description: Now you can throw potion continuously with this weapon!
body:
### One day, I woke up and decided to be productive.
**So, I made this.**\
Hope someone likes it.

------------------------------

### Introducing: My little something mod

This mod adds things that are desert theme (for now), extending some aspect of minecraft.

**For example:**

- Opal
  New resource for crafting new items. Comes in ore form found in layer between stone and deepslate
- Satchel
  Totally original concept of
potion weapon. Throw a potion that deals damage to enemies which can be furthur enhanced by enchantment.
